title: epipactis × gevaudanii
intro: Epipactis × gevaudanii, also known as the hybrid helleborine, is a rare orchid species resulting from the cross between Epipactis palustris and Epipactis microphylla. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis × gevaudanii are said to include the ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is largely based on traditional knowledge and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
